parameters.query:
WITH cfg AS (
  SELECT (
    enabled
    AND alarm_time = to_char((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Cordoba'), 'HH24:MI')
  ) AS fire
  FROM alarm_config
  WHERE id = 1
),
hoy AS (
  SELECT artist, album, left(release_date, 4) AS year
  FROM ephemerides
  WHERE month_day = to_char((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Cordoba'), 'MM-DD')
    AND month_day IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY weight DESC, random()
  LIMIT 4
)
SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT fire FROM cfg), false) AS fire,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('artist', artist, 'album', album, 'year', year)) FROM hoy),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS albums;
